title: Sign in with valid credentials redirects to home dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in and land on the home dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the home dashboard

title: Sign in with wrong password shows authentication error
description: Verifies invalid credentials are rejected with an authentication error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill an invalid password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible

title: Registration creates account and authenticates user
description: Verifies a new user can register and becomes authenticated, landing on the home dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /cadastro
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid CPF into the CPF field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the home dashboard

title: Password recovery request submits successfully
description: Verifies a user can request a password recovery email from the recovery page.

steps.description: Navigate to /recuperar-senha
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Submit the password recovery request
Verify a recovery request confirmation is visible

title: Password reset completion updates password and allows sign in
description: Verifies a user can define a new password on the reset page and then sign in with it.

steps.description: Navigate to /update-password
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same new password into the password confirmation field
Submit the password reset form
Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill the new password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the home dashboard

title: Password recovery with non-existent account shows error
description: Verifies requesting recovery for an unknown email shows an error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /recuperar-senha
Fill a non-existent email into the email field
Submit the password recovery request
Verify an error state for the recovery request is visible

title: Service booking: choose service, select date/time, proceed to summary
description: Verifies the core booking flow from service selection to date/time selection and reaching the summary page.

steps.description: Navigate to /appointments/new
Open the service catalog
Choose a service
Continue to the date and time selection step
Select an available date
Select an available time slot
Continue to the summary step
Verify the booking summary is displayed

title: Service booking: disabled date cannot be selected and alternative date works
description: Verifies disabled dates are blocked and user can select an alternative date to proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /appointments/new
Open the service catalog
Choose a service
Continue to the date and time selection step
Attempt to select a disabled date
Select an alternative available date
Select an available time slot
Continue to the summary step
Verify the booking summary is displayed

title: Service booking: unavailable time slot is blocked and another slot can be chosen
description: Verifies a blocked/unavailable time slot cannot be selected and another slot can be used to continue.

steps.description: Navigate to /appointments/new
Open the service catalog
Choose a service
Continue to the date and time selection step
Select a date with limited availability
Attempt to select an unavailable time slot
Select a different available time slot
Continue to the summary step
Verify the booking summary is displayed

title: Service selection page loads and displays service catalog entry point
description: Verifies the new appointment service selection page loads its primary content.

steps.description: Navigate to /appointments/new
Open the service catalog
Verify available services are displayed

title: Date/time selection page shows date picker and time slots after selecting a service
description: Verifies the date/time selection step loads primary widgets after a service is chosen.

steps.description: Navigate to /appointments/new
Open the service catalog
Choose a service
Continue to the date and time selection step
Verify date selection and available time slots are displayed

title: Appointment History loads and shows history list with filters and pagination controls
description: Verifies the history page loads with a list area and controls to filter and paginate.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open appointment history
Verify the appointment history list is displayed
Verify filter controls and pagination controls are displayed

title: Appointment History filter by period and service and navigate between pages
description: Verifies that applying period and service filters updates the history list and that pagination navigation works.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open appointment history
Fill a valid start date into the from date field
Fill a valid end date into the to date field
Select a service in the service filter
Click the control to apply filters
Click the control to go to the next page of results
Verify the history list updates to reflect the selected filters
Verify the history list changes when navigating to another page

title: Appointment History invalid date range shows validation or empty results and can be corrected
description: Verifies that an invalid period filter is blocked or results in no results, and correcting the range restores results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open appointment history
Fill a valid end date into the from date field that is after the to date
Fill a valid start date into the to date field that is before the from date
Click the control to apply filters
Verify a date range validation error is visible or an empty results state is visible
Adjust the from and to dates to a valid range
Click the control to apply filters
Verify the history list is displayed for the corrected filter range

title: Appointment History pagination boundary does not navigate beyond available pages
description: Verifies the UI prevents navigating past the last page or keeps the list stable when at the end.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open appointment history
Repeatedly click the control to go to the next page until it is no longer available
Verify the next-page control is disabled or unavailable at the end of pagination
Verify the history list remains displayed and does not break

title: Appointment History inspect an individual history item details
description: Verifies that a user can expand or open a history item to view its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open appointment history
Click a history item to view its details
Verify the selected appointment's details are displayed
Verify the appointment status information is displayed for the selected item

title: Appointment History cancel pending future appointment when available
description: Verifies that cancelling is possible for an eligible pending future appointment and the UI updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open appointment history
If available, locate a future appointment item with pending payment status
Click the action to cancel the pending appointment
Confirm the cancellation in the UI confirmation step
Verify the appointment is removed from the list or its status is updated to a canceled state
Verify a cancellation confirmation is visible

title: Appointment History start reschedule flow for a confirmed future appointment
description: Verifies that rescheduling can be initiated from an eligible confirmed future appointment and navigates to reschedule page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open appointment history
If available, locate a confirmed future appointment item
Click the action to start rescheduling
Verify the user lands on the reschedule page
Verify rescheduling date and time selection controls are displayed

title: Appointment Management loads appointments list and allows inspecting details
description: Verifies the appointments page loads and a user can open an appointment to view details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open current appointments
Click an appointment item to inspect details
Verify appointment details are displayed
Verify follow-up actions for the appointment are available when applicable

title: Appointment Management reschedule an appointment to a new valid date and time
description: Verifies the end-to-end reschedule flow updates the appointment and shows the updated schedule in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open current appointments
Click an appointment item to inspect details
Click the action to start the reschedule flow
Select a valid new date allowed by the operating rules
Select an available time slot
Confirm the reschedule
Verify a reschedule confirmation is visible
Verify the appointment list shows the updated date and time for the rescheduled appointment

title: Appointment Management reschedule blocked when selecting a forbidden lead-time date
description: Verifies that selecting a date within the forbidden reschedule window is prevented with validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open current appointments
Click an appointment item to inspect details
Click the action to start the reschedule flow
Select a date that is within the minimum-notice forbidden window
Attempt to proceed to time selection or confirm reschedule
Verify a minimum-notice validation message is visible
Verify the reschedule cannot be confirmed with the forbidden date

title: Profile Management update name, phone, and CPF and persist changes
description: Verifies saving profile changes shows confirmation and the new values remain visible after reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the profile page
Fill Test User Updated into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid CPF into the CPF field
Submit the profile changes
Verify a profile update confirmation is visible
Refresh the page
Verify the name field value is Test User Updated

title: Profile Management invalid CPF prevents saving
description: Verifies CPF validation blocks saving and provides feedback to correct the CPF.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the profile page
Fill 12345678900 into the CPF field
Submit the profile changes
Verify a CPF validation error is visible
Verify the profile changes are not saved

title: Admin dashboard loads and shows today's appointments overview
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can access the admin dashboard and see the primary daily overview content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify the daily appointments overview is displayed
Verify quick stats for today are displayed

title: Admin agenda loads and allows browsing schedule by date
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open the agenda view and change the inspected date.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Click the link to open the agenda view
Select a valid date in the agenda date selector
Verify the schedule for the selected date is displayed

title: Open an appointment in agenda and view its details panel
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open appointment details from the agenda list when items exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Click the link to open the agenda view
Click an appointment item in the schedule list
Verify appointment details are displayed for the selected item

title: Update operating days in admin settings and save
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can change operating day settings and persist changes through a save action.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Click the link to open admin settings
Adjust the operating days selection
Save the settings changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Add a disabled date in admin settings and verify it blocks booking availability
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can add a disabled date and that the booking datetime page reflects the restriction.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Click the link to open admin settings
Add a new disabled date using a valid date selection
Save the settings changes
Navigate to /appointments/new/datetime
Select the same disabled date in the date selector
Verify time slots are not available for the selected disabled date

title: Change service settings and rescheduling rules and save
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can modify service-related settings or rescheduling rules and save them.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Click the link to open admin settings
Adjust a service setting or rescheduling rule
Save the settings changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Leave the admin area to a non-admin page
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can exit admin pages using normal navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Click the link to leave the admin area
Verify the user lands on a non-admin page

title: Non-admin access attempt to admin routes is blocked
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot access admin routes and is redirected or shown an access denied state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify an access denied state is displayed or the user is redirected away from the admin area
